hotels.description_en:
Spacious Accommodation: Treveth in Angaston offers spacious adults-only rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and garden views. Each room includes a kitchenette, dining area, and modern amenities.
Outdoor Amenities: Guests can relax on the sun terrace, in the garden, or by the seasonal outdoor swimming pool. The property features a picnic area and outdoor seating for leisure activities.
Convenient Facilities: Free WiFi is available throughout the property. Additional facilities include a barbecue, tea and coffee maker, and free off-site parking.
Nearby Attractions: Located 87 km from Adelaide Airport and 47 km from Big Rocking Horse. Highly rated for room comfort, swimming pool, and attentive host.
Couples particularly like the location Гўв‚¬вЂќ they rated it 9.

hotels.name: Barossa Shiraz Estate

hotels.description_en:
Barossa Shiraz Estate offers luxurious self-contained cottages in a private vineyard with wood-burning fireplace, views and spa baths in the en suite bathrooms. All cottages include full kitchen facilities, an open-plan dining and lounge area, and a private gas BBQ on the patio. Free local telephone calls are provided in most rooms.
Free provisions for self-catering cooked and continental breakfast for the duration of your stay are stored in pantry and refrigerator upon your arrival. Guests receive a decanter of port wine, chocolates and biscuits upon arrival. Free WiFi is also provided. Stay 2 nights or more and receive a free bottle of estate Barossa wine.
Guests will find a flat-screen TV, DVD player and stereo system in each cottage.

hotels.description_en:
Historic Setting: Le Mas Barossa in Rowland Flat offers a unique adults-only guest house experience within a historic building. Guests enjoy a serene garden and terrace, complemented by a year-round outdoor swimming pool.
Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms feature private bathrooms with free WiFi, air-conditioning, and garden views. Additional amenities include a hot tub, work desk, and soundproofing, ensuring a relaxing and comfortable stay.
Dining Experience: The on-site restaurant serves French cuisine in traditional, modern, and romantic ambiances. Breakfast options include continental, full English/Irish, vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free.
Leisure Activities: Guests can enjoy free bicycles, cycling, and a tour desk.
